TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog5_dakis_takun 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: takun.
S.PHON: takun.
S.FORM: takun.
S.PHON: takun.

S.FORM: un un wasu inu.
S.PHON: un un wasu inu.
S.FORM: un un wasu inu.
S.PHON: un un wasu inu.

S.FORM: waku sapah.
S.PHON: waku sapaħ.
S.FORM: waku sapah.
S.PHON: waku sapaħ.

S.FORM: o kii huwasumu denwa wada inu laqi kii di ha.
S.PHON: o kii ħuwasumu denwa wada inu laqi kii di ħa.
S.FORM: o kii huwasumu denwa wada inu laqi kii di ha.
S.PHON: o kii ħuwasumu denwa wada inu laqi kii di ħa.
S.TRANSL: 我本來要打電話給你的. 那些小孩子去哪裡了?
I was thinking to call you. Where did those children go?

S.FORM: wa hini ka kingan ngudus kii dung a.
S.PHON: wa ħini ka kiŋan ŋudus kii duŋ a.
S.FORM: wa hini ka kingan ngudus kii dung a.
S.PHON: wa ħini ka kiŋan ŋudus kii duŋ a.

S.FORM: wada inu.
S.PHON: wada inu.
S.FORM: wada inu.
S.PHON: wada inu.

S.FORM: ga naq so mhemuc mkkesa alang.
S.PHON: ga naq so mħemuʦ mkkesa alaŋ.
S.FORM: ga naq so mhemuc mkkesa alang.
S.PHON: ga naq so mħemuʦ mkkesa alaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他自己在部落四處晃晃.

S.FORM: wada skadi malu heya ado eniqanna ado eniqan rulu han un un eniqan kana kamera.
S.PHON: wada skadi malu ħeja ado eniqanna ado eniqan ɾulu ħan un un eniqan kana kameɾa.
S.FORM: wada skadi malu heya ado eniqanna ado eniqan rulu han un un eniqan kana kamera.
S.PHON: wada skadi malu ħeja ado eniqanna ado eniqan ɾulu ħan un un eniqan kana kameɾa.
S.TRANSL: He is well. He has a car. He has a camera.

S.FORM: uxe uxe ka kingan kingan nii da asi maku tqipi hini.
S.PHON: uxe uxe ka kiŋan kiŋan nii da asi maku tqipi ħini.
S.FORM: uxe uxe ka kingan kingan nii da asi maku tqipi hini.
S.PHON: uxe uxe ka kiŋan kiŋan nii da asi maku tqipi ħini.
S.TRANSL: 另一個就不是了,他只能縮在這裡.
The other is not. He could only squat here.

S.FORM: ka pa a patis a ka pa a patis a kari seediq peni kari seediq.
S.PHON: ka pa a patis a ka pa a patis a kaɾi seediq peni kaɾi seediq.
S.FORM: ka pa a patis a ka pa a patis a kari seediq peni kari seediq.
S.PHON: ka pa a patis a ka pa a patis a kaɾi seediq peni kaɾi seediq.
S.TRANSL: He is writing on the Seediq language.

S.FORM: o uka uxe mehedu musa skadi uri ma.
S.PHON: o uka uxe meħedu musa skadi uɾi ma.
S.FORM: o uka uxe mehedu musa skadi uri ma.
S.PHON: o uka uxe meħedu musa skadi uɾi ma.
S.TRANSL: Hasn't he gone to look for it?

S.FORM: a ma ye eniqan seediq nosaanna rmengo.
S.PHON: a ma je eniqan seediq nosaanna ɾmeŋo.
S.FORM: a ma ye eniqan seediq nosaanna rmengo.
S.PHON: a ma je eniqan seediq nosaanna ɾmeŋo.

S.FORM: ima naq mkela peni.
S.PHON: ima naq mkela peni.
S.FORM: ima naq mkela peni.
S.PHON: ima naq mkela peni.

S.FORM: egu egu riyung so REDosaun duri.
S.PHON: egu egu ɾijuŋ so ɾedosaun duɾi.
S.FORM: egu egu riyung so REDosaun duri.
S.PHON: egu egu ɾijuŋ so ɾedosaun duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我自己也有很多地方要去.
I myself have many places to go, too.

S.FORM: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.
S.PHON: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.
S.FORM: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.
S.PHON: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.

S.FORM: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.
S.PHON: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.
S.FORM: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.
S.PHON: kini kesaunmu kesaunmu te.

S.FORM: yaku naq maha sa.
S.PHON: jaku naq maħa sa.
S.FORM: yaku naq maha sa.
S.PHON: jaku naq maħa sa.

S.FORM: mahnui osai skadi sapahmu eniqan seediq ga sapahmu kesaunmu.
S.PHON: maħnui osai skadi sapaħmu eniqan seediq ga sapaħmu kesaunmu.
S.FORM: mahnui osai skadi sapahmu eniqan seediq ga sapahmu kesaunmu.
S.PHON: maħnui osai skadi sapaħmu eniqan seediq ga sapaħmu kesaunmu.
S.TRANSL: 「去我家找,我家有人.」我對他說.
"Go to my house. There are people at home," I told him.

S.FORM: diannao nii gagana hunun gana so theyaqun theyaqun naq kingan alang kingan ali na.
S.PHON: diannao nii gagana ħunun gana so tħejaqun tħejaqun naq kiŋan alaŋ kiŋan ali na.
S.FORM: diannao nii gagana hunun gana so theyaqun theyaqun naq kingan alang kingan ali na.
S.PHON: diannao nii gagana ħunun gana so tħejaqun tħejaqun naq kiŋan alaŋ kiŋan ali na.
S.TRANSL: 他在搞電腦.他整天在部落玩電腦.
He is doing something with the computer. He plays the computer all day in the tribe.

S.FORM: un ma maanu gana theyaqun ga so hari.
S.PHON: un ma maanu gana tħejaqun ga so ħaɾi.
S.FORM: un ma maanu gana theyaqun ga so hari.
S.PHON: un ma maanu gana tħejaqun ga so ħaɾi.

S.FORM: smalu kiya naqah si.
S.PHON: smalu kija naqaħ si.
S.FORM: smalu kiya naqah si.
S.PHON: smalu kija naqaħ si.
S.TRANSL: 他好像在做那個又說不好.
He seems to be doing that but says it does not work.

S.FORM: wa kiya naq jikang maanu bale kii di.
S.PHON: wa kija naq jikaŋ maanu bale kii di.
S.FORM: wa kiya naq jikang maanu bale kii di.
S.PHON: wa kija naq jikaŋ maanu bale kii di.
S.TRANSL: 他的時間都花在那裡,那怎麼可以呢?
His time was all spent on that. How can it be like that?

S.FORM: a a malu si malu ma.
S.PHON: a a malu si malu ma.
S.FORM: a a malu si malu ma.
S.PHON: a a malu si malu ma.

S.FORM: uxe uka kari dung.
S.PHON: uxe uka kaɾi duŋ.
S.FORM: uxe uka kari dung.
S.PHON: uxe uka kaɾi duŋ.

S.FORM: ye uxe ini eyah baro karina.
S.PHON: je uxe ini ejaħ baɾo kaɾina.
S.FORM: ye uxe ini eyah baro karina.
S.PHON: je uxe ini ejaħ baɾo kaɾina.
S.TRANSL: 是不是他的聲音沒出來?
Is it that its sound does not come out?

S.FORM: asi ka posaan birac han sa un uxe asi ka eniqan geqiun biracna peni ma.
S.PHON: asi ka posaan biɾaʦ ħan sa un uxe asi ka eniqan geqiun biɾaʦna peni ma.
S.FORM: asi ka posaan birac han sa un uxe asi ka eniqan geqiun biracna peni ma.
S.PHON: asi ka posaan biɾaʦ ħan sa un uxe asi ka eniqan geqiun biɾaʦna peni ma.
S.TRANSL: Are there ones that are inserted into the ears?

S.FORM: inu ma kika eniqan spika a maanu di henu na han na.
S.PHON: inu ma kika eniqan spika a maanu di ħenu na ħan na.
S.FORM: inu ma kika eniqan spika a maanu di henu na han na.
S.PHON: inu ma kika eniqan spika a maanu di ħenu na ħan na.
S.TRANSL: 不是有喇叭嗎?那個他的什麼...

S.FORM: rapa so hari ga naqah.
S.PHON: ɾapa so ħaɾi ga naqaħ.
S.FORM: rapa so hari ga naqah.
S.PHON: ɾapa so ħaɾi ga naqaħ.
S.TRANSL: 好像是他的喇叭壞掉了.
It seems his speaker is out of order.

S.FORM: inu naq kmekulun ka ngudus ka.
S.PHON: inu naq kmekulun ka ŋudus ka.
S.FORM: inu naq kmekulun ka ngudus ka.
S.PHON: inu naq kmekulun ka ŋudus ka.

S.FORM: eniqan naq rulu ma eniqan kamera.
S.PHON: eniqan naq ɾulu ma eniqan kameɾa.
S.FORM: eniqan naq rulu ma eniqan kamera.
S.PHON: eniqan naq ɾulu ma eniqan kameɾa.
S.TRANSL: He has a car and a camera.

S.FORM: tutuy ciga ma keta knwana tutuy a.
S.PHON: tutuj ʦiga ma keta knwana tutuj a.
S.FORM: tutuy ciga ma keta knwana tutuy a.
S.PHON: tutuj ʦiga ma keta knwana tutuj a.
S.TRANSL: He got up so early in the yesterday morning.

S.FORM: seediq peni wa smebuc paye han ciga.
S.PHON: seediq peni wa smebuʦ paje ħan ʦiga.
S.FORM: seediq peni wa smebuc paye han ciga.
S.PHON: seediq peni wa smebuʦ paje ħan ʦiga.

S.FORM: mrebu o musa psasing hiya.
S.PHON: mɾebu o musa psasiŋ ħija.
S.FORM: mrebu o musa psasing hiya.
S.PHON: mɾebu o musa psasiŋ ħija.

S.FORM: musaku nanto ciga um meyahku u kengus maanu kekong ma.
S.PHON: musaku nanto ʦiga um mejaħku u keŋus maanu kekoŋ ma.
S.FORM: musaku nanto ciga um meyahku u kengus maanu kekong ma.
S.PHON: musaku nanto ʦiga um mejaħku u keŋus maanu kekoŋ ma.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天去南投參加結婚.
I went to Nantou yesterday to attend wedding.

S.FORM: nakahara hini.
S.PHON: nakaħaɾa ħini.
S.FORM: nakahara hini.
S.PHON: nakaħaɾa ħini.

S.FORM: kenu uxe.
S.PHON: kenu uxe.
S.FORM: kenu uxe.
S.PHON: kenu uxe.

S.FORM: uxe kekong laqi na iyung nawi uri peni saya.
S.PHON: uxe kekoŋ laqi na ijuŋ nawi uɾi peni saja.
S.FORM: uxe kekong laqi na iyung nawi uri peni saya.
S.PHON: uxe kekoŋ laqi na ijuŋ nawi uɾi peni saja.
S.TRANSL: 今天不是Iyung Nawi的小孩也結婚嗎?
Isn't a child of Iyung Nawi getting married today?

S.FORM: a saya kiya.
S.PHON: a saja kija.
S.FORM: a saya kiya.
S.PHON: a saja kija.

S.FORM: o ciga han zhang minghua de swai Zhang Minghua.
S.PHON: o ʦiga ħan *ħaŋ miŋħua de swai *ħaŋ miŋħua.
S.FORM: o ciga han zhang minghua de swai Zhang Minghua.
S.PHON: o ʦiga ħan *ħaŋ miŋħua de swai *ħaŋ miŋħua.
S.TRANSL: 昨天是張明華的弟弟/妹妹.
Yesterday, it was a brother/sister of Zhang Minghua.

S.FORM: ciga han o.
S.PHON: ʦiga ħan o.
S.FORM: ciga han o.
S.PHON: ʦiga ħan o.

S.FORM: meyahku qidian sngari sterungmu kdere a sipo wa ngudus nguduss ga na.
S.PHON: mejaħku qidian sŋaɾi steɾuŋmu kdeɾe a sipo wa ŋudus ŋuduss ga na.
S.FORM: meyahku qidian sngari sterungmu kdere a sipo wa ngudus nguduss ga na.
S.PHON: mejaħku qidian sŋaɾi steɾuŋmu kdeɾe a sipo wa ŋudus ŋuduss ga na.
S.TRANSL: 我回來的時候,超過十一點,遇到鬍鬚,他在對面懸崖那裡.
When I came back, it was over eleven o'clock. I ran into the beard, who was at the other side on the cliff.

S.FORM: mkkesa di a.
S.PHON: mkkesa di a.
S.FORM: mkkesa di a.
S.PHON: mkkesa di a.

S.FORM: maanu psasing a psasing ga hmuwa manu hngalita.
S.PHON: maanu psasiŋ a psasiŋ ga ħmuwa manu ħŋalita.
S.FORM: maanu psasing a psasing ga hmuwa manu hngalita.
S.PHON: maanu psasiŋ a psasiŋ ga ħmuwa manu ħŋalita.
S.TRANSL: He was taking pictures of our Hngali.

S.FORM: un saya o ga psasing quri breenux ka hngalita.
S.PHON: un saja o ga psasiŋ quɾi bɾeenux ka ħŋalita.
S.FORM: un saya o ga psasing quri breenux ka hngalita.
S.PHON: un saja o ga psasiŋ quɾi bɾeenux ka ħŋalita.
S.TRANSL: 他就面對著我們的Hngali平原拍照?
So he took pictures of our Hngali plain?

S.FORM: un bsuring Hngalita ga musa psasing hiya ma.
S.PHON: un bsuɾiŋ ħŋalita ga musa psasiŋ ħija ma.
S.FORM: un bsuring Hngalita ga musa psasing hiya ma.
S.PHON: un bsuɾiŋ ħŋalita ga musa psasiŋ ħija ma.
S.TRANSL: 對,他去那裡拍我們Hngali的耕地.
Yes, he went there and took pictures of our farmland in Hngali.

S.FORM: un ma naq malu heya kmhemuc mkkesa mesa mesaku.
S.PHON: un ma naq malu ħeja kmħemuʦ mkkesa mesa mesaku.
S.FORM: un ma naq malu heya kmhemuc mkkesa mesa mesaku.
S.PHON: un ma naq malu ħeja kmħemuʦ mkkesa mesa mesaku.
S.TRANSL: 我想他怎麼那麼好,可以去想去的地方.
I think how good it is for him to go wherever he wants.

S.FORM: heya naq murux ye ye ye neyah ka mqedin.
S.PHON: ħeja naq muɾux je je je nejaħ ka mqedin.
S.FORM: heya naq murux ye ye ye neyah ka mqedin.
S.PHON: ħeja naq muɾux je je je nejaħ ka mqedin.
S.TRANSL: 只有他一個人嗎?那個女的有來嗎?
Is he alone? did the woman come?

S.FORM: uka meyah a.
S.PHON: uka mejaħ a.
S.FORM: uka meyah a.
S.PHON: uka mejaħ a.

S.FORM: o o o mahku mahaku kiya di sa.
S.PHON: o o o maħku maħaku kija di sa.
S.FORM: o o o mahku mahaku kiya di sa.
S.PHON: o o o maħku maħaku kija di sa.
S.TRANSL: He said, "I will be back later."

S.FORM: kii gakuna rengoun mahaku naq a niciyo gakuna kesaun.
S.PHON: kii gakuna ɾeŋoun maħaku naq a niʦijo gakuna kesaun.
S.FORM: kii gakuna rengoun mahaku naq a niciyo gakuna kesaun.
S.PHON: kii gakuna ɾeŋoun maħaku naq a niʦijo gakuna kesaun.
S.TRANSL: 他原本就跟我說:「我星期天要回去.」
He said to me, "I'm going back on Sunday."

S.FORM: a muka a ima di mukan wa.
S.PHON: a muka a ima di mukan wa.
S.FORM: a muka a ima di mukan wa.
S.PHON: a muka a ima di mukan wa.
S.TRANSL: 哪一位? 是那個閩南人嗎?
Which one? That Southern Min guy?

S.FORM: maha hmuwa naqah bushi bushi bushi naqah henu ma hmuwa ka ngudus maha kiya uri.
S.PHON: maħa ħmuwa naqaħ busħi busħi busħi naqaħ ħenu ma ħmuwa ka ŋudus maħa kija uɾi.
S.FORM: maha hmuwa naqah bushi bushi bushi naqah henu ma hmuwa ka ngudus maha kiya uri.
S.PHON: maħa ħmuwa naqaħ busħi busħi busħi naqaħ ħenu ma ħmuwa ka ŋudus maħa kija uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 那個鬍鬚怎麼樣,也要走嗎?
What about the beard? Is he leaving, too?

S.FORM: maha kiya di um hmuwa di.
S.PHON: maħa kija di um ħmuwa di.
S.FORM: maha kiya di um hmuwa di.
S.PHON: maħa kija di um ħmuwa di.

S.FORM: o wasu hmuwa hmuwa ma tayriku ma wasu yesu jueding maha.
S.PHON: o wasu ħmuwa ħmuwa ma tajɾiku ma wasu jesu juediŋ maħa.
S.FORM: o wasu hmuwa hmuwa ma tayriku ma wasu yesu jueding maha.
S.PHON: o wasu ħmuwa ħmuwa ma tajɾiku ma wasu jesu juediŋ maħa.
S.TRANSL: 要去大陸的事怎麼樣了?你決定要去了嗎?
How about that matter of going China? Have you decided to go yet?

S.FORM: asi naq a.
S.PHON: asi naq a.
S.FORM: asi naq a.
S.PHON: asi naq a.
S.TRANSL: 那就這一兩天可能兩萬要匯過去了啦.

S.FORM: o eniqan un hmuwa yesu maha bale yesu.
S.PHON: o eniqan un ħmuwa jesu maħa bale jesu.
S.FORM: o eniqan un hmuwa yesu maha bale yesu.
S.PHON: o eniqan un ħmuwa jesu maħa bale jesu.

S.FORM: ha mahaku so.
S.PHON: ħa maħaku so.
S.FORM: ha mahaku so.
S.PHON: ħa maħaku so.

S.FORM: uxesuna ga padisun peni wakuna padisun patis yaku wa.
S.PHON: uxesuna ga padisun peni wakuna padisun patis jaku wa.
S.FORM: uxesuna ga padisun peni wakuna padisun patis yaku wa.
S.PHON: uxesuna ga padisun peni wakuna padisun patis jaku wa.
S.TRANSL: 他沒寄給你嗎?他寄信給我了.
Didn't he send to you? He sent the letter to me.

S.FORM: XXXX inikuna padisi yaku na wana padisun inu di.
S.PHON: xxxx inikuna padisi jaku na wana padisun inu di.
S.FORM: XXXX inikuna padisi yaku na wana padisun inu di.
S.PHON: xxxx inikuna padisi jaku na wana padisun inu di.
S.TRANSL: 他沒寄給我.他寄到哪裡去了?
He didn't send it to me. Where did they send to?

S.FORM: ha padisun nokay.
S.PHON: ħa padisun nokaj.
S.FORM: ha padisun nokay.
S.PHON: ħa padisun nokaj.
S.TRANSL: Maybe he sent to the farmers' association.

S.FORM: e maanu patis maanu pnadisanna ha un eniqan.
S.PHON: e maanu patis maanu pnadisanna ħa un eniqan.
S.FORM: e maanu patis maanu pnadisanna ha un eniqan.
S.PHON: e maanu patis maanu pnadisanna ħa un eniqan.

S.FORM: eniqan o mita hii kiya hari da.
S.PHON: eniqan o mita ħii kija ħaɾi da.
S.FORM: eniqan o mita hii kiya hari da.
S.PHON: eniqan o mita ħii kija ħaɾi da.
S.TRANSL: I will go there to see it.

S.FORM: me meyahsu hori kiya hari.
S.PHON: me mejaħsu ħoɾi kija ħaɾi.
S.FORM: me meyahsu hori kiya hari.
S.PHON: me mejaħsu ħoɾi kija ħaɾi.
S.TRANSL: Are you coming to Hori later?

S.FORM: o naqah wa iniku gdema musa mi musa m mdamac m mteme seediq ga gmeeluk pila taicu hi wa.
S.PHON: o naqaħ wa iniku gdema musa mi musa m mdamaʦ m mteme seediq ga gmeeluk pila taiʦu ħi wa.
S.FORM: o naqah wa iniku gdema musa mi musa m mdamac m mteme seediq ga gmeeluk pila taicu hi wa.
S.PHON: o naqaħ wa iniku gdema musa mi musa m mdamaʦ m mteme seediq ga gmeeluk pila taiʦu ħi wa.
S.TRANSL: 不巧我沒空,我要去台中湊熱鬧看搶錢.
Unfortunately, I will not be free. I'm going to join in watching people fighting for money in Taichung.

S.FORM: maanu kiya o.
S.PHON: maanu kija o.
S.FORM: maanu kiya o.
S.PHON: maanu kija o.

S.FORM: um a malu kii dungan.
S.PHON: um a malu kii duŋan.
S.FORM: um a malu kii dungan.
S.PHON: um a malu kii duŋan.

S.FORM: heya um malu kii riyung malu riyung o knuwan eniqansu jikan hata mita texan.
S.PHON: ħeja um malu kii ɾijuŋ malu ɾijuŋ o knuwan eniqansu jikan ħata mita texan.
S.FORM: heya um malu kii riyung malu riyung o knuwan eniqansu jikan hata mita texan.
S.PHON: ħeja um malu kii ɾijuŋ malu ɾijuŋ o knuwan eniqansu jikan ħata mita texan.
S.TRANSL: 很好.你有時間的時候,我們去看一次.
It's fine. When you have time, let's go see once.

S.FORM: iya anisu naq ini pahaesumu pqitaku teta huwa mesa mukan pgeeluk pila.
S.PHON: ija anisu naq ini paħaesumu pqitaku teta ħuwa mesa mukan pgeeluk pila.
S.FORM: iya anisu naq ini pahaesumu pqitaku teta huwa mesa mukan pgeeluk pila.
S.PHON: ija anisu naq ini paħaesumu pqitaku teta ħuwa mesa mukan pgeeluk pila.
S.TRANSL: 不管怎樣,我帶你去看看台灣人怎麼搶錢.
No matter what, I will take to see how Southern Min people fight for money.

W.TRANSL: 去-受焦.非現實=2SG.主格=1SG.屬格

S.FORM: ima ka osaunnamu mita ga mhuqin singgi.

S.TRANSL: 你們要去信義鄉看的那個過世的人是誰?
Who is the person who passed away and who you will go to see in Xinyi?

S.FORM: ye mnimah sino ma ptebuk muda ptebuk si.
S.PHON: je mnimaħ sino ma ptebuk muda ptebuk si.
S.FORM: ye mnimah sino ma ptebuk muda ptebuk si.
S.PHON: je mnimaħ sino ma ptebuk muda ptebuk si.

That chairman. Maybe he drank wine and bumped.

S.FORM: un te kii kesaunsumu iniku iniku paadis yaku dung ma.
S.PHON: un te kii kesaunsumu iniku iniku paadis jaku duŋ ma.
S.FORM: un te kii kesaunsumu iniku iniku paadis yaku dung ma.
S.PHON: un te kii kesaunsumu iniku iniku paadis jaku duŋ ma.
S.TRANSL: 所以我才跟你說我還沒有匯.
So I told you I have not transferred it yet.

S.FORM: netun so netun so paadis hmuwa ye yesumu uxe supuun paadis.
S.PHON: netun so netun so paadis ħmuwa je jesumu uxe supuun paadis.
S.FORM: netun so netun so paadis hmuwa ye yesumu uxe supuun paadis.
S.PHON: netun so netun so paadis ħmuwa je jesumu uxe supuun paadis.
S.TRANSL: Do you want me to transfer together?

S.FORM: eniqan 帳號su hii na yemu ga patisun hini wa.
S.PHON: eniqan **su ħii na jemu ga patisun ħini wa.
S.FORM: eniqan 帳號su hii na yemu ga patisun hini wa.
S.PHON: eniqan **su ħii na jemu ga patisun ħini wa.
S.TRANSL: 我可能有把帳號記下來喔.
Perhaps I wrote down the account.

S.FORM: wadamu wadamu wadasu qadaanun.

S.FORM: kelaun ye wada inu di peni paadis kiya.
S.PHON: kelaun je wada inu di peni paadis kija.
S.TRANSL: 可能...我不曉得那個信在哪裡了.
Maybe... I don't know where that letter is.

S.FORM: un asi ka dehuk inisu eniq hii do posai posai so so ckuesu peni ckuesu a di peni.
S.PHON: un asi ka deħuk inisu eniq ħii do posai posai so so ʦkuesu peni ʦkuesu a di peni.

If you are not there, put it on your desk.

S.FORM: e meniqku ka meniqku hini kusun.

S.PHON: o meniqku ħini kusun******* eniqan maku tmgesa laqi kusun.
S.TRANSL: 我會在,因為明天要去教重修課.
I'll be here because tomorrow I'm going to teach a retake course.

It might be their phone call three o'clock yesterday midnight, twice.

S.FORM: inu kiya wa saya wa saya.

S.FORM: ma maha kelaun moda maha德國.

S.FORM: ma maha kelaun moda maha德國.
S.PHON: ma maħa kelaun moda maħa**.
S.TRANSL: 他們在法國,然後會經過荷蘭,到德國.
They are in France. Then they are going to pass the Netherlands and go to Germany.

S.FORM: yesu uxe neyah alang ma uxe.
S.PHON: jesu uxe nejaħ alaŋ ma uxe.
S.FORM: yesu uxe neyah alang ma uxe.
S.PHON: jesu uxe nejaħ alaŋ ma uxe.
S.TRANSL: Are you not coming back to the tribe?

S.FORM: uxe miicuku mimah wa naqah.
S.PHON: uxe miiʦuku mimaħ wa naqaħ.
S.FORM: uxe miicuku mimah wa naqah.
S.PHON: uxe miiʦuku mimaħ wa naqaħ.
S.TRANSL: No, I'm afraid of drinking. It's bad.

S.FORM: adoku uncuin na pmahunkudaha de.
S.PHON: adoku unʦuin na pmaħunkudaħa de.
S.FORM: adoku uncuin na pmahunkudaha de.
S.PHON: adoku unʦuin na pmaħunkudaħa de.
S.TRANSL: 如果我有時候喝一兩杯,他們讓我喝的話...
If I sometimes drink one or two cups. They make me drink...

S.FORM: ye kii.
S.PHON: je kii.
S.FORM: ye kii.
S.PHON: je kii.

S.FORM: yaku naq yaku naq dung maanu ka imahunta.
S.PHON: jaku naq jaku naq duŋ maanu ka imaħunta.
S.FORM: yaku naq yaku naq dung maanu ka imahunta.
S.PHON: jaku naq jaku naq duŋ maanu ka imaħunta.
S.TRANSL: 我自己又很後悔,我們為什麼要喝.
I myself will regret why we drank.

S.FORM: uka所以就像以前剛meyah sapah hini ciida we kiya uxe mesa henu peni takun so hari mesa naqah ga mnarux naqah sa.
S.PHON: uka*******mejaħ sapaħ ħini ʦiida we kija uxe mesa ħenu peni takun so ħaɾi mesa naqaħ ga mnaɾux naqaħ sa.

S.TRANSL: Takun,不是說謝敏男生不好的病?
Takun, weren't we talking about Xie Minnan getting a bad illness?

S.FORM: unsaunsu mita.
S.PHON: unsaunsu mita.
S.FORM: unsaunsu mita.
S.PHON: unsaunsu mita.

S.FORM: mnarux naqah kiya wa.

S.FORM: mnarux naqah kiya wa.

S.FORM: uxe so hari yani uxe pqbsiyaq.
S.PHON: uxe so ħaɾi jani uxe pqbsijaq.
S.TRANSL: It seems that he won't last long.

S.FORM: iya kmheti rmengo.

S.FORM: wada sapah na saya di.

S.FORM: ima naq mkela qnitaanmu texan ke a oriru henu hii.
S.PHON: ima naq mkela qnitaanmu texan ke a oɾiɾu ħenu ħii.
S.FORM: ima naq mkela qnitaanmu texan ke a oriru henu hii.
S.PHON: ima naq mkela qnitaanmu texan ke a oɾiɾu ħenu ħii.
S.TRANSL: 誰知道呢?我有一次看到他在那裡下車.
Who knows? I saw him there get out of a car once.

S.FORM: nisu uxe mntena yaku knkure duri peni.
S.PHON: nisu uxe mntena jaku knkuɾe duɾi peni.
S.FORM: nisu uxe mntena yaku knkure duri peni.
S.PHON: nisu uxe mntena jaku knkuɾe duɾi peni.
S.TRANSL: 不是也跟我一樣那麼瘦了嗎?
Isn't he already as thin as I?

S.FORM: so hari uka beyaxna mkesa di.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi uka bejaxna mkesa di.
S.FORM: so hari uka beyaxna mkesa di.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi uka bejaxna mkesa di.
S.TRANSL: 他連走路的力量都沒有.
He even doesn't have the strength to walk.

S.FORM: hei hei mnnanang paru seediq kii cbeyo.
S.PHON: ħei ħei mnnanaŋ paɾu seediq kii ʦbejo.
S.FORM: hei hei mnnanang paru seediq kii cbeyo.
S.PHON: ħei ħei mnnanaŋ paɾu seediq kii ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 那個人以前身體非常強健.
That man used to be very strong.

S.FORM: kiya naqah qitaan.
S.PHON: kija naqaħ qitaan.
S.FORM: kiya naqah qitaan.
S.PHON: kija naqaħ qitaan.
S.TRANSL: So he does not look good.

S.FORM: so mnnanang riyung so hari kure riyung di ma.
S.PHON: so mnnanaŋ ɾijuŋ so ħaɾi kuɾe ɾijuŋ di ma.
S.FORM: so mnnanang riyung so hari kure riyung di ma.
S.PHON: so mnnanaŋ ɾijuŋ so ħaɾi kuɾe ɾijuŋ di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他本來很強健,現在好像很瘦.
He used to be very strong, but now seems to be very thin.

S.FORM: meyah do ga smiling a laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: mejaħ do ga smiliŋ a laqi ɾseno nii.
S.FORM: meyah do ga smiling a laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: mejaħ do ga smiliŋ a laqi ɾseno nii.

S.FORM: maanu di meyahsu de mahaku taapa rulusu adisunmu kusun denu.
S.PHON: maanu di mejaħsu de maħaku taapa ɾulusu adisunmu kusun denu.
S.FORM: maanu di meyahsu de mahaku taapa rulusu adisunmu kusun denu.
S.PHON: maanu di mejaħsu de maħaku taapa ɾulusu adisunmu kusun denu.
S.TRANSL: 他說:「你來的話,我要搭你的車.」那明天我會帶他去.
He said, "If you are coming, I'll ride in your car." I'll bring him over tomorrow.

S.FORM: adisi mrebu kusun da ma adisunmu hmaduc a kii.
S.PHON: adisi mɾebu kusun da ma adisunmu ħmaduʦ a kii.
S.FORM: adisi mrebu kusun da ma adisunmu hmaduc a kii.
S.PHON: adisi mɾebu kusun da ma adisunmu ħmaduʦ a kii.
S.TRANSL: 明天早上帶他來好了,然後我可以陪他.
Bring him over tomorrow morning. Then I'll accompany him.

S.FORM: meyah mrebu de osai hmaduc ciida di.
S.PHON: mejaħ mɾebu de osai ħmaduʦ ʦiida di.
S.FORM: meyah mrebu de osai hmaduc ciida di.
S.PHON: mejaħ mɾebu de osai ħmaduʦ ʦiida di.
S.TRANSL: 你早上來的話,那個時候送去.
If you come in the morning, send him at that time.

S.FORM: uxe ini huwa usa skadi mrebu han eniqan seediq rengoun kesai.
S.PHON: uxe ini ħuwa usa skadi mɾebu ħan eniqan seediq ɾeŋoun kesai.
S.FORM: uxe ini huwa usa skadi mrebu han eniqan seediq rengoun kesai.
S.PHON: uxe ini ħuwa usa skadi mɾebu ħan eniqan seediq ɾeŋoun kesai.
S.TRANSL: 不是啦,沒關係啦.叫他早上先去找,才有人對話.
No, it does not matter. Tell him to look for people in the morning, so there are people to talk with.

S.FORM: ima naq mkela peni.
S.PHON: ima naq mkela peni.
S.FORM: ima naq mkela peni.
S.PHON: ima naq mkela peni.

S.FORM: a pprengo daka bubumu so hari.
S.PHON: a ppɾeŋo daka bubumu so ħaɾi.
S.FORM: a pprengo daka bubumu so hari.
S.PHON: a ppɾeŋo daka bubumu so ħaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 他跟我媽媽互相講話,好像...
I talked with my mother, and he seems...

S.FORM: uxe ga naqah henu na ga.
S.PHON: uxe ga naqaħ ħenu na ga.
S.FORM: uxe ga naqah henu na ga.
S.PHON: uxe ga naqaħ ħenu na ga.
S.TRANSL: 不是啦,他那個好像壞掉.

S.FORM: diannao na ga gana ini adisi a manu di mprengo mprengona gaga.
S.PHON: diannao na ga gana ini adisi a manu di mpɾeŋo mpɾeŋona gaga.

S.FORM: huwa bari hori hini ma.
S.PHON: ħuwa baɾi ħoɾi ħini ma.
S.FORM: huwa bari hori hini ma.
S.PHON: ħuwa baɾi ħoɾi ħini ma.
S.TRANSL: He intended to buy it in Puli.

S.FORM: so smhlis uri laqi wa.
S.PHON: so smħlis uɾi laqi wa.
S.FORM: so smhlis uri laqi wa.
S.PHON: so smħlis uɾi laqi wa.

S.FORM: uxe de ini so ima naq madis nii eniqan tayhoku kiyamu sa.
S.PHON: uxe de ini so ima naq madis nii eniqan tajħoku kijamu sa.
S.FORM: uxe de ini so ima naq madis nii eniqan tayhoku kiyamu sa.
S.PHON: uxe de ini so ima naq madis nii eniqan tajħoku kijamu sa.
S.TRANSL: 誰要帶這個?他說:「台北有我這個東西」.
Who will bring this? "I have this in Taipei," he said.

S.FORM: un pnqbahanganku kii meniq tayhoku texan.
S.PHON: un pnqbaħaŋanku kii meniq tajħoku texan.
S.FORM: un pnqbahanganku kii meniq tayhoku texan.
S.PHON: un pnqbaħaŋanku kii meniq tajħoku texan.
S.TRANSL: 在台北曾經用那個給我聽.
He once had me hear that in Taipei.

S.FORM: mdrumuc laqi nii.
S.PHON: mdɾumuʦ laqi nii.
S.FORM: mdrumuc laqi nii.
S.PHON: mdɾumuʦ laqi nii.

S.PHON: kii na naq.

S.PHON: kii na naq.

S.FORM: un un iya chungii nii patis a uda hini kusun denu taraosumu denu.
S.PHON: un un ija ʦħuŋii nii patis a uda ħini kusun denu taɾaosumu denu.
S.FORM: un un iya chungii nii patis a uda hini kusun denu taraosumu denu.
S.PHON: un un ija ʦħuŋii nii patis a uda ħini kusun denu taɾaosumu denu.
S.TRANSL: 不要忘記那個文件.你明天從這裡經過,我會等你.
Don't forget this document. Pass by here. I'll be expecting you.

S.FORM: un kelaunsu muda kelaunsu so paadis pila henu.
S.PHON: un kelaunsu muda kelaunsu so paadis pila ħenu.
S.FORM: un kelaunsu muda kelaunsu so paadis pila henu.
S.PHON: un kelaunsu muda kelaunsu so paadis pila ħenu.
S.TRANSL: 你知道經過...你才知道怎麼寄錢.
You know to pass...so you know how to transfer money.

S.FORM: un un kiya ha.
S.PHON: un un kija ħa.
S.FORM: un un kiya ha.
S.PHON: un un kija ħa.
